buildCommand: pnpm --filter @tedu-pass/db prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @tedu-pass/web build && (echo 'locating prisma engine:'; find node_modules -name 'libquery_engine-rhel-openssl-3.0.x.so.node' -print -exec cp {} apps/web/.next/server/ \; ; ls -la apps/web/.next/server/libquery_engine-* || true)
